deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd — Becky Lynn Steffen Estate
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded Apr 27, 2026. Lien resolved via Fernando Castillo signature Apr 21. Post-close: gift delivery, thank Sam VanDenheuvel, thank Michael notary.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket to Joyce. Send thank you to Chelsey Bongiovi.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21.
Follow-up email sent to Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release. Delivered to Chicago Title.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. Current offer stalled. Steve clearing property complete. Lead with net after close on next offer. Do not react to individual line items.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve. When next offer comes, lead with net after close positioning.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked in. Commission box correction needed.
New prospect interested in subdividing. Clearing complete with photos posted.
Clearing work complete. First offer confirmed dead. RBFCU stalled, no earnest money.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751 — Priority Bank REO
deals.notes: Pre-listing cleanup active. Floor demo done, drywall cut. Utilities confirmed with Medina Electric and East Medina County SUD. Listing agreement needed to Priority Bank. Transformer number to grab on-site tomorrow for electric meter install.
deals.next: Get transformer number tomorrow. Submit Medina Electric application. Finalize listing agreement. Send to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Cleanup active. Drywall cut for electrician/plumber. Email sent to Kelly with utility info.
Listing agreement needs to go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
On-site visit. Work moving. Met Bryce dumpster contractor - wife is active military VA buyer lead.
Work officially starting. Dumpsters running.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr — Charles Matthew Gamez & Chandler Grulli
deals.notes: Underwater by ~$93K-$143K. Carrying cost $5,300-6,000+/month. Payoff ~$493K. Market value $350K-$400K. Three paths identified. Email sent May 14 with options. Awaiting seller response.
deals.next: Call Matt and Chandler with three paths. First confirm broker guidance on short sale protocol.

logs.m: Full market analysis and three options emailed to sellers. Commission negotiation lever offered.
Stopped by property. Landscaping quote pending.
Buyer showing scheduled. Lawn care quotes obtained.
Gilberto seller finance buyers appear wishy-washy. Price adjustment conversation needed.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path — Jose Arango & Katherine
deals.notes: Listed May 14. First showing feedback received. Filipino buyers flagged cultural/feng shui concerns. MK at Texas Hilltop Homes requesting preinspection and roof status. Insurance roof claim moving forward. Some furniture negotiable. Must close second week of June.
deals.next: Monitor for second showing or offer. Track roof/fascia insurance decision. Send updates to showing agents.

logs.m: MLS live. First showing feedback received. Cultural concerns flagged. Preinspection sent to agent.
Insurance adjuster out. Roof claim approved. New roof incoming.
Listing agreement signed. Photos received. Going live May 14.
Pre-inspection scheduled with Coach Ricky Smith.

deals.title: 00 Borregas — Sisters (Elmendorf)
deals.notes: Title defect confirmed in Deed 20100079485 - missing exhibits. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed. Isaac Linares interested in ~$150K mobile home development (half veteran, half profit). Price adjustment needed. Sisters excited about development angle.
deals.next: Follow up with sisters on listing extension. Contact Van Hutchins for correction deed. Connect Isaac with Josh LT as partner.

logs.m: Isaac expanded concept to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Jennifer took initiative on title defect. Attorney Van Hutchins handling correction deed.
Sisters excited about Isaac development offer. Need formal offer conversation.

deals.title: Moran — Milagros Stringer New Construction
deals.notes: Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month P&I. Rate buydowns are the angle. MI Homes option from Frank under review. Not locked to Grace Gardens. Multiple builders pulling inventory.
deals.next: Follow up with Milagros on timeline. Confirm if reviewed MI Homes option. Register as agent on first builder visit.

logs.m: Need to follow up on timeline and MI Homes review option from Frank.
Buyer rep signed. Multiple builder options being pulled for rate buydown scenarios.
Buyer rep agreement signed via Skyslope.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss — James Jimbo Stringer Rental
deals.notes: Listing agreement must go out TODAY. Jimbo replied with all 12 questions answered. Rent $1,595/month. 1,535 sqft 3BR/2BA Lennar home in Grace Gardens. HOA $300 quarterly. New 2025 construction. Vinyl signs needed.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope. Send for signatures today. Vinyl signs order.

logs.m: Jimbo replied with all answers. Rent $1,595/month confirmed. Ready to finalize listing agreement.
CMA analysis completed. Direct comp 8523 Green Bliss at $1,595/month.
Talked to Jimbo. His son made flyers. Ready to move forward.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell — Buyer
deals.notes: Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA firm requirement. Pre-approval status unknown with Zach Schaphorst. Receptive to new construction with rate buydowns. Need to confirm Zach pre-approval status immediately.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Set up new construction home search. Identify no-HOA builders.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com platform. Hopefully browsing while pre-approval sorts out.
Rental selling. Pivoting to new construction. Receptive to rate buydown benefits.
Debt paid off. Pre-approval expected Feb 2026 with Zach Schaphorst.

logs.m: Connection noted. Consider for Priority Bank REO work.

leads.next: Call Kurt. Pull CMA for his area. Get CMA and listing timeline together.

leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story. Keep nurturing - no rush on real estate.

leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote listing to network. If current realtor stalls, position as natural next call.

leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor directly behind her house may have passed. Son now owns. Deceased was avid gardener. Son not yet contacted. Probate/inherited property opportunity.
leads.next: Get son info from Miss Pat. Reach out as neighbor and gardener first. Assess if keeping, renting, or selling.

leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 (Priority Bank property) May 11. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and property needed. Understand financing and work scope.

leads.detail: Long-standing contact - Chris helped Brandon get into real estate. Green Bliss rental listing (8527). Mom (Milagros) is new construction buyer. Buyer rep signed. Grace Gardens Lennar community interest. Strong commission opportunity.
leads.next: Send PM company options to Brandon. Confirm rental details. Register as Milagros agent on first builder visit.
